name: @gjsify/example-dom-webtorrent-seed
description: WebTorrent local seed + download demo — tests WebRTC data channels via P2P torrent transfer for GJS and Node.js

scripts.build:gjs: gjsify build src/gjs/gjs.ts --app gjs --outfile dist/gjs.js --globals auto,RTCPeerConnection,RTCSessionDescription,RTCIceCandidate,WebSocket,fetch && node -e "const fs=require('fs');let c=fs.readFileSync('dist/gjs.js','utf8');c=c.replaceAll('__toESM(require_lib3(), 1)','__toESM(require_lib3(), 0)');fs.writeFileSync('dist/gjs.js',c)"
